description:
Durable Material-Hose and brass valve are made of high quality 304 stainless steel, smooth, rust resistant, durable and easy to clean.

Leak-Proof & High Quality-The hose features double protection with a stainless steel casing and an EPDM inner tube (better than PVC), to get rid of leak problems. The sprayer has 304 high quality stainless steel-10 times more durable than ABS .

Quick and Easy Installation-Comes with the installation kit so you don't have to buy anything else. You can use it as a toilet sprayer for cloth diapers,  including  Sprayer , Hose, Sprayer Holder (for wall or toilet side mounting), teflon plumbers tape and screw.

 

Suitable Occasion-A great cleaning bidet sprayer kit for a whole family, especially for anyone with limited mobility due to surgery, arthritis, postpartum or injuries, ideal for elderly adults, can be used as cloth diaper sprayer, bathroom cleaning and even for pet washing

Package Dimensions : 8.66 x 6.88 x 2.75 inches

Package Weight: 1.87 pounds

Item Weight  : 1.65 pounds

Material: Stainless Steel

Color: Sliver

Usage: Bidet, Rinsing, Cleaning, Diaper Sprayer, Washing, Feminine Hygiene

 

Installation Instructions

1. Turn off water feed.

2. Disconnect toilet hose from flush tank.

3. Connect T-adapter to flush tank.

4. Connect toilet hose and shower hose to T-adapter 

5. Connect other end of shower hose to sprayer.

6. Turn water feed back on.

7. Assemble hanger and mount (instructions on separate color insert).

 

 

Water distribution valve, spray gun, hose, hanging seat, fixing screw and accessorie
